query: you have a response get it
answer: Here's the latest from the AI7 briefing as of June 10, 2026. Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, has filed for IPO at a $965B valuation, and its previously withheld Mythos model is now available to enterprise customers. OpenAI filed its own confidential S-1 targeting a September 2026 IPO at ~$852B. NVIDIA locked in HBM memory supply with SK Hynix through 2030 and is partnering with Apple and Google to rebuild Siri. Snowflake unveiled Horizon Catalog at Summit 2026, centralizing AI governance for enterprises. Palantir won a NIH ARPA-H AI contract and launched on Google Cloud Marketplace with BigQuery and Gemini integrations. Mistral made the case for European AI sovereignty at Fortune Brainstorm Tech, positioning its open-weight models as the key alternative to US providers. Databricks is in talks to raise at a $165–175B valuation while its CEO continues to rule out a 2026 IPO.
